---
name: Design partner interest
about: Explore a shadow-mode SMERC pilot against a real or realistic workflow
title: "Design partner interest: "
labels: ["design-partner", "pilot"]
---

## Workflow Category

Examples: GitHub Actions, AI coding agent, cloud administration, security automation, customer support automation, finance workflow.

## Current Governance Approach

How is the workflow currently allowed, denied, reviewed, or approved?

## Recoverability Concern

What can go wrong, and how hard is it to undo?

## Shadow Mode Feasibility

Can SMERC score actions without blocking production at first?

## Success Criteria

What would make a pilot useful?

## Data Boundaries

Do not include secrets, private customer data, regulated data, or confidential incident details in this public issue.
